description: Machine-readable fixture for the R20 stability gate contract: hot-table persistence bounded diagnostics, queue/outbox hygiene, no-live canary boundary, and stale R14 PR reconciliation policy.

v0Freeze.note: R20 stability gate acceptance criteria, bounded diagnostics, no-live canary boundary, hot-table persistence invariants, queue/outbox hygiene requirements, and stale R14 PR reconciliation policy are frozen as the Contract v0 stability gate baseline.

processMemoryRssHeap.failClosedCondition: raw /proc/*/status or host-specific paths in evidence

activeTaskTableCount.failClosedCondition: unbounded table count without bound or diagnostic

memoryBoundInvariants.passCondition: lazy/paged access, incremental persistence, or equivalent memory-bounded pattern
memoryBoundInvariants.failClosedCondition: full historical task/audit/outbox materialization on startup or each hot-row mutation

memoryBoundInvariants.passCondition: representative row count does not require proportional startup heap
memoryBoundInvariants.failClosedCondition: startup heap required proportional to total rows

memoryBoundInvariants.passCondition: WAL checkpoint or journal mode keeps size bounded under sustained load
memoryBoundInvariants.failClosedCondition: journal/WAL grows without bound under load

memoryBoundInvariants.passCondition: memory stays under documented threshold for representative workloads

perRunItemLimit.passCondition: maximum items processed per cycle is documented and finite

progressReporting.passCondition: cycle reports processed, skipped, and remaining counts

dryRunSafety.passCondition: dry-run mode reports what would be processed without mutation
dryRunSafety.failClosedCondition: dry-run does not exist or mutates state

ageBasedStaleness.passCondition: stale unacked items exceeding documented threshold are identified
ageBasedStaleness.failClosedCondition: stale items processed or silently skipped without identification

mutationApprovalGate.passCondition: any mutation path requires explicit operator approval

hygieneInvariants.passCondition: no tasks stuck in claimed/running past documented timeout
hygieneInvariants.failClosedCondition: stale tasks in claimed/running without detection

hygieneInvariants.passCondition: total queued items bounded, throughput meets demand
hygieneInvariants.failClosedCondition: queue grows without bound with no diagnostic

hygieneInvariants.passCondition: outbox mutation commands fail in dry-run mode unless approval present

hygieneInvariants.invariant: terminal ACK not forged from accepted-send
hygieneInvariants.passCondition: provider accepted-send never promoted to terminal-outbox ACK
hygieneInvariants.failClosedCondition: code or documentation describes path from sendStatus: accepted to terminal-outbox ACK

noLiveInvariants.passCondition: providerMessageId, providerAccepted, sendStatus:accepted, sendStatus:sent are accepted-send only
noLiveInvariants.failClosedCondition: any code/contract promotes these to terminal ACK

noLiveInvariants.passCondition: evidence comments carry isApproval:false, isTerminalAck:false, isReadReceipt:false
noLiveInvariants.failClosedCondition: any evidence comment omits or falsifies these flags

noLiveInvariants.passCondition: Terminal Brief evidence is receipt level 2 (requester-visible) at most
noLiveInvariants.failClosedCondition: Terminal Brief described as terminal-outbox ACK or read receipt

noLiveInvariants.invariant: live provider send blocked by default
noLiveInvariants.passCondition: any live notification path disabled by default, requires explicit allowlisting
stability validation runs in no-live mode; evidence contains no live send data
noLiveInvariants.failClosedCondition: stability evidence includes live provider send data

canaryActivationPreconditions.passCondition: live canary disabled by default; requires explicit allowlist entry for fresh task/outbox id
canaryActivationPreconditions.failClosedCondition: no allowlist guard; approval covers multiple actions

canaryActivationPreconditions.passCondition: evidence key deduplication and projection key idempotency prevent duplicate notifications
canaryActivationPreconditions.failClosedCondition: same evidence key produces multiple sends or ACK mutations

canaryActivationPreconditions.passCondition: post-send evidence captures accepted-send only; explicitly separates ACK
canaryActivationPreconditions.failClosedCondition: post-send evidence claims terminal ACK or read receipt

canaryActivationPreconditions.passCondition: post-canary evidence proves no-live defaults restored
canaryActivationPreconditions.failClosedCondition: no restoration step recorded; default remains allowlisted

canaryActivationPreconditions.passCondition: separate operator comment names exact canary scope, fresh task/outbox id, and allowlist entry
canaryActivationPreconditions.failClosedCondition: approval comment missing, covers multiple actions, or references stale/replayed ids

policyActions.passCondition: PR passes current-main validation (build, contract fixtures, release gate) and has no unresolved review comments
PR explicitly closed as superseded with a comment referencing the superseding PR or issue
policyActions.failClosedCondition: PR closed as superseded without explanation or reference

policyActions.passCondition: PR intentionally abandoned with a comment explaining why
PR blocked on external dependency; left open with comment documenting dependency
policyActions.failClosedCondition: PR left open without comment or tracking issue
